mapper.sql: id, record_id, rating, before_status, after_status, before_interval_days, after_interval_days, before_repetition_count, after_repetition_count, before_ease_factor, after_ease_factor, reviewed_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ielts_review_logs ( id, record_id, rating, before_status, after_status, before_interval_days, after_interval_days, before_repetition_count, after_repetition_count, before_ease_factor, after_ease_factor, reviewed_at ) VALUES ( #{id,jdbcType=OTHER}, #{recordId,jdbcType=OTHER}, #{rating}, #{beforeStatus}, #{afterStatus}, #{beforeIntervalDays}, #{afterIntervalDays}, #{beforeRepetitionCount}, #{afterRepetitionCount}, #{beforeEaseFactor}, #{afterEaseFactor}, #{reviewedAt} )
mapper.select: SELECT FROM ielts_review_logs WHERE record_id = #{recordId,jdbcType=OTHER} ORDER BY reviewed_at DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ielts_review_logs WHERE DATE(reviewed_at AT TIME ZONE 'UTC') = #{date}
